# BossBoard

BossBoard (TradeMate NZ) is a mobile-first business management and compliance platform designed specifically for New Zealand tradespeople (electricians, plumbers, builders, etc.).

## About
BossBoard streamlines the "paperwork" of running a trade business. It provides AI-powered compliance documents, GST-ready invoicing, job tracking, and team management in a single offline-first application.

## Key Features
- **AI SWMS**: Generate WorkSafe NZ-compliant Safe Work Method Statements in seconds.
- **Invoicing & Quotes**: Professional, GST-compliant documents sent from the job site.
- **Job Tracking**: Real-time logging of hours, site photos (GPS-tagged), and expenses.
- **Team Management**: Coordinate crew, assign jobs, and manage roles.
- **Offline Sync**: Works without signal; syncs automatically when back online.

- [Privacy Policy](https://bossboard.instilligent.com/privacy) - Privacy and data handling.
- [Terms of Service](https://bossboard.instilligent.com/terms) - Usage terms.
